'''Golorno''' was the young [[Human/Legends|Human]] sensor officer aboard ''[[Mon Remonda]]'' during General [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo's]] hunt for [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Zsinj]]. He died when he was sucked into the vacuum of space after [[Nuro Tualin]]'s brainwashed assault on ''Mon Remonda''.

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
[[Chris Trevas]] revealed at [[Celebration VI]] that the depiction of Golorno in his illustration for [[The Essential Reader's Companion]] was based on himself.

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Solo Command]]'' {{Ab|X-Wing: Solo Command (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
